title: bupleurum gerardi var. filicaule
intro: Bupleurum gerardi var. filicaule, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven, is a plant species in the Apiaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, as well as its ability to regulate the immune system and reduce stress. The health benefits of Bupleurum gerardi var. filicaule include reducing fatigue, improving liver function, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the plant is often combined with other herbs, such as ginseng and licorice root, and can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture.
